name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
Punishing your mafia boss husband for bad behavior 🥴🔥

Basically he left you out during a mafia event and you saw him drinking whiskey surrounded by prostitutes (he wanted to make you jealous) 😔

I would slap him to death to be honest, but since I'm ovulating I'll forget about it 😓 I thought about this scenario a few days ago after reading a book with this scene... 😝 I love ID Leon that's why I chose him again 😔💗

I've programmed a fixed scene, but feel free to change it if you prefer! The final plot is always up to you, hehe! Enjoy and mistreat him :> 💕

I even need to know if you want the reverse bot for this 🤧💗

》》 Reverse bot here!! ♡♡
creator: y4su
